layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 lg:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-6 for card interiors, py-8 for main sections. Ensure generous spacing within containers, but maintain density in tabular data.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: 0.25rem (4px) or rounded-sm for a sharp, technical, enterprise feel.
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: High-contrast Sidebar (Dark mode sidebar in a light theme app, or stark white with sharp 1px right border).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for data and forms. Center only for zero-state/empty-state messages.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat background (bg-card), 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-md).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Solid Background with a hard 1px bottom border (border-b border-border).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.modals_overlays: Glassmorphism with heavy blur (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) and 1px inner stroke.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.status_badges: High contrast pill badges. Red for critical, Yellow for alerts, Green for passing compliance, Grey for pending.

components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary: Solid Klein Blue (bg-primary). Secondary: Outline with stark text.
components.tables: Dense rows. Stark headers (uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs). Hover on rows: background shifts to muted (bg-muted/50).
components.charts: Recharts with high-contrast lines. Use 'Single Trusted Number' pattern for top KPIs (massively sized numbers to reduce cognitive load).
components.agent_workflow_graph: Use a node-based visual or vertical timeline to show the 8 agents (Coordinator, Fraud, Compliance, etc.). The active node should glow or pulse to indicate live processing.
components.file_upload: Dashed border area with a central icon, light grey background. Changes to solid primary border on drag over.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Must explicitly set text and background color (e.g., hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground).
motion_and_interaction.loading_states: Shimmer loaders (animate-pulse) for data-heavy sections instead of spinners, ensuring trust and avoiding a 'broken' feeling during complex AI processing.

login_hero_background.description: Clear glass building interior representing corporate transparency, structure, and enterprise scale.

abstract_data_network.description: Abstract illustration of complex digital neural networks, to be used in report headers or empty states.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets at least a 4.5:1 contrast ratio against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-financial-data-btn', data-testid='risk-score-value').
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Visible focus rings are mandatory: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-offset-2.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the font import URLs into /app/frontend/src/index.css or /app/frontend/public/index.html.
Update /app/frontend/tailwind.config.js to include Cabinet Grotesk (as font-heading) and IBM Plex Sans (as font-body), and set the border radius to 0.25rem.
Build standard React (.js/.jsx) functional components. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx).
Use Shadcn UI components extensively (Cards, Tables, Badges, Progress, Tabs, Dialogs) but strip out any overly soft rounded corners to fit the Swiss Brutalist/Enterprise tone.
Implement the 'Single Trusted Number' pattern in the dashboard. The primary KPI (like 'Overall Risk Score') should be massive and immediately visible.
Construct a visually distinct Agent Execution View displaying the 8 agents. A technical timeline, stepper, or dependency graph that highlights the active agent via SSE updates.
For the Benford's Law visualization in the findings, utilize a Recharts BarChart overlaid with a Line representing the expected logarithmic curve.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use the URLs provided in the media_and_assets section.
Ensure the entire application feels like a mission-critical command center for elite auditors: data-dense, highly functional, deeply authoritative, and devoid of unnecessary visual fluff.
